# Results Directory

This directory contains outputs from the rabies genomic analysis.

## Contents

- `assemblies/` - Genome assemblies (FASTA files)
- `trees/` - Phylogenetic trees (Newick format)
- `figures/` - Visualization plots
- `tables/` - Summary tables

## Generated Files

- `assemblies/` - Assembled genomes from SPAdes
- `trees/` - Phylogenetic trees from IQ-TREE
- `figures/` - Phylogenetic tree visualizations
- `tables/` - Variant summary tables
